description: Eval cases for DAX formula optimization skill

test_cases.name: Repeated calculation without VAR
test_cases.input:
Optimize this DAX measure:
Sales Growth % = ([Total Sales] - CALCULATE([Total Sales], PREVIOUSMONTH('Date'[Date]))) / CALCULATE([Total Sales], PREVIOUSMONTH('Date'[Date]))

This calculates MoM growth and is used in 5 visuals. It feels slow.
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must introduce VAR for PreviousMonth calculation, use DIVIDE for safety

test_cases.name: Unsafe division operator
test_cases.input:
Review this measure:
Profit Margin = [Gross Profit] / [Total Revenue]
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must flag unsafe division and recommend DIVIDE function with alternate result

test_cases.name: COUNT on non-nullable column
test_cases.input:
Is this optimal?
Order Count = COUNT(Orders[OrderID])
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must recommend COUNTROWS(Orders) as more performant alternative

test_cases.name: Complex nested CALCULATE without variables
test_cases.input:
Optimize for readability:
YTD vs LY = DIVIDE(CALCULATE([Sales], DATESYTD('Date'[Date])), CALCULATE([Sales], DATESYTD(DATEADD('Date'[Date], -1, YEAR)))) - 1
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must use VARs for both CALCULATE blocks, clear variable names, DIVIDE for safety

test_cases.name: FILTER used as filter argument
test_cases.input:
Why is this slow?
CategoryTotal = CALCULATE([Sales], FILTER(ALL(Products), Products[Category] = "Electronics"))
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify FILTER(ALL(...)) anti-pattern and replace with direct column filter
